## P1: FSS = 0.0 (No Learning)

### Issue Description
- ALL FSS values for NAIVE baseline are 0.0
- brier_actual == brier_ref (model performs exactly like baseline)
- No skill improvement detected across any asset

### Evidence
```sql
-- Sample FSS entries
asset_id | brier_actual | brier_ref | fss_value | baseline_method
----------|--------------|-----------|-----------|-----------------
ABNB      | 0.2784       | 0.2784    | 0.0000    | NAIVE
ADBE      | 0.9968       | 0.9968    | 0.0000    | NAIVE
NVDA      | null         | null      | null      | BASE_RATE_EMPIRICAL_BETA_30D_STRICT
```

### Impact
- System is NOT learning
- No predictive skill above random
- FSS computation may be broken

### Root Cause Candidates
1. Forecast generation broken (returns baseline predictions)
2. Outcome linkage broken (outcomes not matching forecasts)
3. FSS formula bug (always returns 0.0)

### Required Action
- Investigate forecast generation logic
- Verify outcome linkage integrity
- Review FSS computation formula

## P1: 1,062 TIMEOUT_PENDING Hypotheses

### Issue Description
- 1,062 hypotheses stuck in TIMEOUT_PENDING status
- Average wait time: 38.6 hours
- Max wait time: 142.79 hours (6 days)

### Evidence
```sql
-- Hypothesis status breakdown
status          | count  | avg_confidence
-----------------|--------|----------------
DRAFT            | 1      | NULL
FALSIFIED        | 224    | 0.5329
TIMEOUT_PENDING  | 1,062  | 0.5306

-- TTL analysis
status          | avg_ttl_hours | min_ttl_hours | max_ttl_hours
-----------------|---------------|---------------|---------------
FALSIFIED        | 92.48         | 90.48         | 94.49
TIMEOUT_PENDING  | 38.62         | 24.00         | 142.79
```

### Impact
- Learning pipeline blocked
- New hypotheses cannot be processed
- Falsification daemon not clearing backlog

### Required Action
- Process TIMEOUT_PENDING backlog
- Verify hypothesis_death_daemon functionality
- Clear 142-hour max TTL violations

## P1: BSS Placeholder Bug

### Issue Description
- 692/712 decision packs have NULL BSS
- 20/712 have BSS = 0.7114 (identical placeholder)
- All 20 packs with BSS are FAILED status

### Evidence
```sql
-- BSS distribution
null_count   | computed_count | avg_bss | min_bss | max_bss
-------------|----------------|---------|---------|---------
692          | 20             | 0.7114  | 0.7114  | 0.7114

-- Sample BSS entries
pack_id                              | brier_skill_score | raw_confidence | execution_status
-------------------------------------|------------------|----------------|-----------------
da5153c6-7d35-48ae-b81f-b2ed5b1c2f8f    | 0.7114           | 0.97           | FAILED
12ca8a74-8162-43ed-9cee-3d1cd9363ebb    | 0.7114           | 0.97           | FAILED
```

### Impact
- False learning metrics
- Cannot assess decision pack quality
- Placeholder value masks real issues

### Required Action
- Implement genuine BSS calculation
- Fix NULL BSS values
- Investigate why all 20 packs are FAILED

### Issue Description
REGIME_WEIGHTED_DECAY LVI method is 27+ days stale.

```sql
computation_method          | count | last_computed         | staleness_hours
---------------------------|-------|----------------------|-----------------
REGIME_WEIGHTED_DECAY      | 474   | 2026-01-20 22:32:47 | 27+ days
lvi_canonical_definition_c | 2     | 2026-02-16 21:23:10 | 17 hours
lvi_calculator_v1          | 3     | 2026-02-16 12:58:41 | 1 day
```

### Impact
- 474 historical LVI values using stale method
- Confusion over which LVI is canonical
- Regime-weighted insights lost

### Required Action
- Deprecate REGIME_WEIGHTED_DECAY
- Standardize on lvi_canonical_definition_c
- Document migration

### Required Action
